chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: The Tasks page is managed through Consellour chat and tools. Use it to create, update, recommend, and review workspace tasks with consistent priority metadata.

chunks.heading: Prerequisites
chunks.text: Consellour requires an OpenAI API key in workspace settings. Without a key, chat can load but tool-driven task operations are blocked.

chunks.heading: Chat behavior
chunks.text: When you send a prompt, Consellour may call task tools such as create, get, edit, and recommend. Responses are concise and grounded in the latest workspace task list.
